---
title: "Words"
---
::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals

:::


<span class="blue-badge">Slides: Words ↗</span>

Readings: 

<span class = "reading-badge">SGN Ch. 5: *Activating words*</span>
<span class = "exam-badge">Mesgarani et al. (2014)</span>

<span class = "reading-badge">SGN Ch. 6: *Representing meaning*</span>
<span class = "exam-badge">Huth et al. (2016)</span>
